description: Canonical patterns for loading, empty, and error states. Never invent a new pattern — always pick from this spec.

selection_guide.loading-skeleton: Data is being fetched and layout is known. Always prefer over spinner.
selection_guide.loading-spinner: Short-lived background action where layout cannot be predicted.
selection_guide.empty-table: Query returned 0 results. Keep thead + pagination visible.
selection_guide.empty-section: Section has no data yet (first-use / no items added). Offer a primary action.
selection_guide.error-section: A single section/widget failed to load. Scope to that section only.
selection_guide.error-full-page: The entire page cannot render (rare). Keep topbar + nav.
selection_guide.error-field: Form field failed validation on blur.

loading-skeleton.border_radius: Match the shape it replaces: 4px for text/rows, 44px for badge/button shapes
loading-skeleton.rule: Keep thead always visible during table skeleton load — only replace tbody rows.
do: Match skeleton dimensions closely to real content.
Vary widths (60%/85%/45%) to avoid a mechanical look.
Keep thead visible throughout load for tables.
dont: Never use a spinner when layout is predictable.
Never hide thead or pagination during load.
Never animate an entire card — skeleton only individual lines.

empty-table.heading: No Data… For Now!
empty-table.subtext: No records match your current filters. Try adjusting your search.
empty-table.cta: None — no Refresh or Add button
empty-table.colspan: Span all columns on the empty <td>
empty-table.example_html:
🚦
No Data… For Now!
No records match your current filters.
do: Always use 🚦 emoji for table empty state.
Keep thead and pagination rows visible.
Keep filter controls accessible so user can adjust.
dont: Never use 🚧 in table empty state.
Never add a Refresh button to a table empty state.

empty-section.heading: No [Items] Added Yet
empty-section.subtext: Describe what can be added and the benefit. Max 2 lines.
empty-section.cta: One primary action button (ds-btn sz-md t-primary)
empty-section.example_html:
📋
No Vendors Added Yet
Add your first vendor to start tracking risk.
do: Use 📋 emoji as default for first-use empty states.
Keep copy concise — one sentence of context + one CTA label.
dont: Never use 🚧 or 🚦 for first-use empty states.
Never add more than one CTA.
Never write "There are no items" — be specific about what's missing.

error-section.heading: Data Retrieval Failed
error-section.subtext: We couldn't load this section. Other parts of the page are still functional.
error-section.scope: Always scoped to the failing section — never redirect the whole page.
error-section.example_html:
🚧
Data Retrieval Failed
We couldn't load this section. Other parts of the page are still functional.
do: Scope error to the exact section that failed.
Reassure user that the rest of the page works.
dont: Never redirect the entire page for a section failure.
Never show a stack trace or technical error message.
Never use 🚦 in an error state.

error-full-page.heading: Oops! That Wasn't Supposed to Happen
error-full-page.subtext: We ran into an unexpected issue. Try refreshing — it usually helps.
error-full-page.cta: Refresh Page button (ds-btn sz-md t-primary, onclick=location.reload())
error-full-page.example_html:
ERROR
🚧
Oops! That Wasn't Supposed to Happen
We ran into an unexpected issue. Try refreshing — it usually helps.
do: Keep topbar and left-nav visible — user needs orientation.
Include the ERROR watermark for full-page errors only.
Offer exactly one action: Refresh Page.
dont: Never show technical details or stack traces.

error-field.trigger: Blur on invalid field — never per-keystroke
error-field.message: ⓘ icon (12×12 stroke) + specific message, font-size:11px, color:#dc2626, margin-top:4px
error-field.example_html: Enter a valid email address
do: Always pair red border with a specific error message below the field.
Preserve the field value — never clear it on error.
dont: Never show a red border without a message.
Never clear the field value when showing an error.

rules_summary: 🚦 = table empty state only. 🚧 = all error states.
Skeleton loaders over spinners whenever layout is known.
Scope errors to the failing section — never kill the whole page.
thead + pagination always visible during load AND empty states.
Field errors: blur-triggered only, paired message required.
